flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 12 pp at Buena Vista University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (47.3% vs 59.5%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Buena Vista University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($37.5k → $41.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Buena Vista University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($37.5k → $41.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Buena Vista University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.6% → 0.0%).
